Считаем разницу истинных параметров прямой $a$ и $b$ и их оценок. Здесь также используются 2 варианта: с подавлением окрестности около локального максимума и без.

```{r}
library(Rcpp)
source("hough transform/hough_transform.r")
source("hough transform/convolution.r")
source("ssa-based methods/cssa-transform.r")


library(transport)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
```

Матрица изображения

```{r}
n_col = 100
n_row = 100

matrix <- matrix(0, ncol=n_col, nrow=n_row) |> add.line(b=10) |> add.line(a=-0.5, b = 50)
noisy_matrix <- matrix |> add.noise(sigma=0.2)

```





Для начала подготовим функции для нахождения k максимумов с локальным подавлением вокруг максимума и без.


```{r}
library(Rcpp)
library(tibble)

sourceCpp("hough_error.cpp")

convert_ab_to_rho_theta <- function(a, b) {
  
  theta <- atan(-1 / a)
  rho   <- b * sin(theta)
  c(rho, theta)
}

hough_err <- function(img, detector_fun, use_nms = FALSE,
                      theta_step = 1, rho_step = 1,
                      true_lines_rt, num_of_lines = 2) {
  m <- detector_fun(img)
  idx <- which(m > 0, arr.ind = TRUE)
  if (nrow(idx) == 0) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))
  theta <- seq(0, pi, by = theta_step * pi/180)
  acc <- hough_accumulator(idx, theta, rho_step)
  compute_hough_error(
    acc,
    quant_rho   = seq(-nrow(acc)/2, nrow(acc)/2) * rho_step,
    quant_theta = theta,
    true_lines_rt = as.matrix(true_lines_rt),
    k = num_of_lines,
    is_suppression = use_nms,
    suppression_window = 6
  )
}
```



Результаты:

```{r}
max_iter     <- 1
theta_step   <- 1
rho_step     <- 1
num_of_lines <- 2

true_lines <- data.frame(a = c(1, -0.5), b = c(10, 50))
true_lines_rt <- as.data.frame(t(apply(
  true_lines, 1,
  function(row) convert_ab_to_rho_theta(row["a"], row["b"])
)))

err_rho        <- numeric(6)
err_theta      <- numeric(6)
err_rho_nms    <- numeric(6)
err_theta_nms  <- numeric(6)

methods <- c("row.row","col.col","row.col","col.row","Intensity","Gradient")
detectors <- list(
  function(m) cssa_detector(m, method="row.row"),
  function(m) cssa_detector(m, method="col.col"),
  function(m) cssa_detector(m, method="row.col"),
  function(m) cssa_detector(m, method="col.row"),
  intensity_detector,
  intensity_gradient_detector
)

matrix <- matrix(0, ncol=n_col, nrow=n_row) |> add.line(b=10) |> add.line(a=-0.5, b = 50)


for (iter in seq_len(max_iter)) {
  
  noisy_matrix <- matrix |> add.noise(sigma=0.2)
  for (i in seq_along(methods)) {
    e  <- hough_err(noisy_matrix, detectors[[i]], FALSE,
                    theta_step, rho_step, true_lines_rt, num_of_lines)
    eN <- hough_err(noisy_matrix, detectors[[i]], TRUE,
                    theta_step, rho_step, true_lines_rt, num_of_lines)
    if (!anyNA(e)) {
      err_rho[i]   <- err_rho[i]   + e[1]
      err_theta[i] <- err_theta[i] + e[2]
    }
    if (!anyNA(eN)) {
      err_rho_nms[i]   <- err_rho_nms[i]   + eN[1]
      err_theta_nms[i] <- err_theta_nms[i] + eN[2]
    }
  }
}

result <- tibble(
  Method        = methods,
  MeanRhoError  = err_rho  / max_iter,
  MeanThetaError= err_theta / max_iter
)

result_nms <- tibble(
  Method             = methods,
  MeanRhoError_nms   = err_rho_nms  / max_iter,
  MeanThetaError_nms = err_theta_nms / max_iter
)

print(result)
print(result_nms)

```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
true_lines_rt

result |> mutate(MeanRhoError = MeanRhoError/7.071068^2, MeanThetaError=MeanThetaError / (0.7853982)^2 )
result_nms |> mutate(MeanRhoError_nms = MeanRhoError_nms/7.071068^2, MeanThetaError_nms=MeanThetaError_nms / (0.7853982)^2)
```
